---
name: Content Request
about: Request an article, blog post, or LinkedIn content piece
labels: content
---

## Topic
<!-- What is the article about? One clear sentence. -->


## Angle
<!-- What's the unique take or argument? What makes this worth reading? -->
<!-- Example: "Most AI pipelines optimize for speed. We optimize for trust." -->


## Target Audience
<!-- Who is this for? What do they know? What do they care about? -->
<!-- Example: "Senior engineers evaluating AI orchestration tools" -->


## Key Points
<!-- 3-5 points the article must make. These drive the structure. -->
1. 
2. 
3. 


## Platform
<!-- Where will this be published? -->
<!-- Options: LinkedIn article, LinkedIn post, blog (connylazo.com), newsletter -->


## Source Material
<!-- Existing content, research, or experiences to draw from -->
<!-- Example: "Lessons from #468 pipeline failures — see memory/2026-03-17.md" -->


## Tone & Style
<!-- How should it sound? Any specific voice requirements? -->
<!-- Example: "Mark Twain — dry wit, serious points through humor. No corporate speak." -->


## Word Count
<!-- Approximate target -->


## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Article makes the key points above without burying them
- [ ] No claims without sources or real examples
- [ ] Passes fact-check phase
- [ ] Voice matches the author's established tone
